rule.instruction: Bands of lines 12 inches (30 cm) wide, in three directions (vertical, horizontal, diagonal right) intersecting.

designs.title: even plaid, medium
designs.intent: three sets aligned; structural plaid with gaps breathing (Klee #11).

designs.title: offset sets
designs.intent: each set phase-shifted so the crossings never coincide — per-set variety (Klee #11).

designs.title: wide bands, airy
designs.intent: fewer, wider bands, big gaps — maximal breathing room (Klee #3, #7).

designs.title: narrow bands, busy
designs.intent: many narrow bands — denser weave, still gapped (Klee #5).

designs.title: vertical-led
designs.intent: tight vertical lines vs looser cross sets — directional emphasis (Klee #16).

designs.title: loose diagonal
designs.intent: sparse diagonal crossing denser orthogonals — straight-vs-grid tension (Klee #14).

designs.title: tight grid, sparse diag
designs.intent: orthogonal plaid with a wide-spaced diagonal accent (Klee #16).

designs.title: broad weave
designs.intent: broad bands, generous gaps — calm, legible crossings (Klee #7).

designs.title: shifted thirds
designs.intent: phase shifted by thirds of the period — rhythmic offset (Klee #13).

designs.title: fine lines, wide gaps
designs.intent: finely-ruled bands far apart — bands read as solid ribbons crossing (Klee #5).

designs.title: dense-ish even
designs.intent: smaller gaps; testing the edge of the no-mud rule (Klee #5).

designs.title: asymmetric widths
designs.intent: wide bands, mid gaps, strong phase offsets — lively not tidy (Klee #8).

designs.title: airy fine
designs.intent: fine lines, very airy bands — breathing emphasised (Klee #3).

designs.title: tight weave
designs.intent: narrower bands, moderate gaps — a busier but still-gapped weave (Klee #5).

designs.title: broad airy offset
designs.intent: wide bands, big phase offset between sets — distinct, uncrowded (Klee #7, #11).

designs.title: medium offset weave
designs.intent: balanced medium weave with offset sets — the all-rounder (Klee #11).
